completed.title: Date Completed
completed.description: This date has been marked as completed. You can view the details but cannot make changes.

readOnly.title: Read Only View
readOnly.description: You are viewing this date as {{firstName}} {{lastName}}.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel Date?
cancelDialog.intro: Are you sure you want to cancel this date? Doing this will remove your match. Note that you can always reschedule your availability, even after confirming.
cancelDialog.reasonLabel: Send a reason to your match (optional):
cancelDialog.reasonPlaceholder: Not feeling well / my car broke down / etc...
cancelDialog.outro: This action cannot be undone, though you may be able to be matched again in the future :)

rescheduleDialog.title: Reschedule Date?

limit.intro: You have already rescheduled this date twice.
limit.info: Each person can reschedule up to two times. If you need to make further changes, please coordinate directly with your match.

headsUp.label: Heads up:
headsUp.body: You can reschedule this date one more time.

rescheduleDialog.confirmIntro: Are you sure you want to reschedule this date?

warning.label: Warning:
warning.twice: This can only be done twice per person.
warning.reEnter: Both you and your match will need to re-enter availability.
warning.reset: Any existing confirmations will be reset.

rescheduleDialog.reasonLabel: Send a reason to your match (optional):
rescheduleDialog.reasonPlaceholder: I'm busy next week / need more time / etc...
rescheduleDialog.notify: Doing this will send a notification to your match.

instructions.vote: Tap a venue to vote — the availability grid will update to match.
instructions.match: You both picked the same spot!

planner.instructionsLine1: Click & drag to set your availability — on mobile, press & hold, then drag.
planner.instructionsLine2: We'll find a good time & place for both of you.

phone.label: Email my phone number 1 hour before date:
phone.description: Completely optional, but can be helpful to coordinate last-minute date logistics with your match :)
phone.matchShares: We'll email you {{name}}'s phone number 1 hour before the date.

noOverlapDialog.partnerFreeHint: Tap one to add it to your availability — that instantly creates a match.
noOverlapDialog.title: No Overlap Found :(
noOverlapDialog.intro: It looks like your availability doesn't overlap with the other user's availability.
noOverlapDialog.tryAgain: Please try and find a time that works for both of you!
noOverlapDialog.tipIntro: Overlap is shown with a <teal>teal</teal> square:
noOverlapDialog.tipExplainer: when <green>your availability</green> overlaps with <blue>your match's availability</blue>.
noOverlapDialog.tipImageCaption: This image shows availability overlap on Monday from 9:30AM - 10:30AM.
noOverlapDialog.saveAnywayBody: If this really isn't possible, you can save anyway and we'll notify the other user to ask if they can expand their availability - but if no overlap is found before {{date}}, the match may be cancelled.

autoConfirmDialog.title: Setup Date?
autoConfirmDialog.intro: This will set up the date and notify your match!

phoneMissing.title: No phone number on file
phoneMissing.description: Add a phone number in your profile before sharing it with your match.

confirmationCheckError.title: Error
confirmationCheckError.description: Could not verify confirmation status. Please try again.

availabilitySavedVote.title: Availability saved!
availabilitySavedVote.description: Pick your venue above — once you both vote, the date will be confirmed.

noVenueAvailable.title: No venue available
noVenueAvailable.description: We couldn't find a venue open during your shared availability. Your match has been notified — try adjusting your times.

dateConfirmedAuto.title: Date confirmed!
dateConfirmedAuto.description: Your date time and location have been set.

dateConfirmedManual.title: Date confirmed!
dateConfirmedManual.description: You have confirmed the date time and location.

errorSettingDate.title: Error setting date
errorSettingDate.description: Could not completely set the date.

dateRescheduled.title: Date Rescheduled
dateRescheduled.description: The date has been moved back. Please re-enter your availability.

phoneShareUpdated.title: Phone preference updated!
phoneShareUpdated.description: Your phone share preference has been updated.
